findings.title: Data-deletion promised, no deletion code path
pageContext re-sends last-5 messages already in conversationHistory
thought-stream buffers/connections leak on early-return paths
Auto web-search injected on every query regardless of need
'No tracking cookies' contradicted by PostHog cookie persistence

'Zero hallucinations' absolute claim on paid pricing success page
